headline: Best Monthly Dividend ETFs for Consistent Income
summary: If you're looking for more frequent payouts, you can still enjoy the benefits of low fees and broad diversification, thanks to these top monthly dividend ETFs.

headline: PepsiCo: 'Upgrading' From Strong Sell To Sell, But I Still Expect Frozen Returns
summary: PepsiCo showed a sales boost of 6.4% for the quarter, as margins face pressure, and leverage rises. Find out why PEP stock is upgraded to sell.
